title: justicia puberula
intro: Justicia puberula, also known as the hairy Justicia, is a plant species in the family Acanthaceae, native to Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Justicia puberula include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and alleviating digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or oil to create teas, tinctures, and topical creams that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
